analysis.period_summary: March 1–14 generated $3,225.67 from 81 front-end sales. Paid traffic is marginally profitable but email is carrying the funnel, with organic + Maropost driving 71% of revenue. Backend conversion is weak: OTO1 at 29.6% and OTO2 at 12.3% are below healthy benchmarks.

northstar.commentary: Email RPV at $0.31 is within the healthy $0.28–0.35 range, but paid RPV at $0.82 is below the $1.00 profitability threshold with CPA near break-even.

needle_movers.why: Campaign #88 Facebook delivered 6.67% CR and $62.33 revenue from just 15 views—outlier performance. If this holds at scale, it could be the breakthrough paid campaign. Currently spending only ~$50 over 2 weeks.
what: Increase daily budget by 3x immediately to validate conversion rate with 100+ views
Duplicate winning ad set and test 2 new audience segments
Monitor CPA closely—target staying below $80 USD ($107 SGD)
needle_movers.revenue_impact: At 6.67% CR and $157 avg funnel value (if backend improves), 300 views = 20 sales = $3,140 revenue vs ~$450 spend = $2,690 profit.

needle_movers.why: OTO2 downsell at 1.2% take rate with only 1 sale over 14 days strongly suggests broken redirect. Healthy downsells convert 15–25% of OTO2 declines. You're leaving ~$770 on the table.
what: Audit dhr-d redirect link in ClickBank—check it loads correctly
Test checkout flow manually from OTO2 decline path
If broken, file ClickBank support ticket and re-test within 24 hours
needle_movers.revenue_impact: 81 frontend sales → 24 OTO1 → ~57 saw OTO2 → ~47 declined. At 20% downsell take vs 1.2%, that's 9 sales instead of 1 = 8 × $77 = $616 lost revenue.

needle_movers.why: OTO1 (SSR) at 29.6% is below the 40%+ healthy benchmark. Improving by 10 percentage points = 8 more $67 sales per 81 buyers = $536 extra revenue per period.
what: A/B test OTO1 video: add social proof testimonial in first 30 seconds
Test urgency timer on OTO1 page (24-hour countdown)
Review OTO1 copy—emphasize transformation gap between frontend and Soul Signature
needle_movers.revenue_impact: 81 buyers × 10% lift = 8 more OTO1 sales × $67 = $536. At 50% take rate, that's 16 more sales = $1,072.

needle_movers.why: Campaign #51 Facebook shows 2.96% CR on 203 views with $301 revenue—solid retargeting performance. This is warm traffic (likely pixel audience), so it can absorb more budget without degrading performance.
what: Increase budget by 50% and monitor for 5 days
Expand lookalike audience from 1% to 2% and test
Ensure pixel is firing on OTO pages to build better retargeting pool
needle_movers.revenue_impact: At 2.96% CR and $157 avg value, doubling traffic to 400 views = 12 sales = $1,884 revenue. Current CPA likely low given retargeting nature.

needle_movers.why: Campaigns #70, #74, #80, #81 show 0% CR across 137 combined views. These dead segments dilute list health and waste send credits. Cut them and reallocate volume to working campaigns.
what: Redirect that list volume to #87 (Interactive VSL V2) which has 0.43% CR
Review email cadence—possibly re-engage cold subscribers with content before pitching
needle_movers.revenue_impact: 137 views at 0.43% CR = 0.6 sales = ~$94. Small but compounds over time, and improves sender reputation.

needle_movers.why: Campaign 120241560726640718 (InteractiveVSL CopyV3) shows 2.09% LP CTR on Facebook—below the 4–6% healthy range. Low CTR = wasted ad spend. Campaign spent $106 SGD but only delivered 19 LP views.
what: Test new ad creative—use curiosity hook instead of direct pitch
Test video thumbnail image A/B (face vs mystical imagery)
Review ad copy—ensure alignment with landing page promise
needle_movers.revenue_impact: Improving LP CTR from 2.09% to 4% = 37 LP views instead of 19 from same 909 impressions. At 0.22% CR, that's 0.08 sales = ~$12.50 per period. At scale, this compounds.

scorecard.status_reason: 0.5% CR, on low end of healthy
0.57% CR, high volume but low conversion

analysis.data_notes: CPV conversions (70) vs ClickBank sales (81) mismatch is inverted from normal pattern—suggests some postbacks not firing or CPV tracking delayed. Revenue diff of 2.56% is within tolerance. OTO2 downsell dhr-d with only 1 sale over 14 days is statistical red flag for broken redirect—needs immediate audit.
